Skip to contents
emaxnls 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Simulate responses from Emax regression model

Source: R/emaxnls-methods.R
simulate.emaxnls.Rd

Simulate responses from Emax regression model

Usage

# S3 method for class 'emaxnls'
simulate(object, nsim = 1, seed = NULL, ...)

Arguments

object

An emaxnls object

nsim

Number of replicates

seed

Used to set RNG seed

...

Ignored

Value

A data frame or tibble

Examples

mod <- emax_nls(
  structural_model = response_1 ~ exposure_1, 
  covariate_model = list(E0 ~ cnt_a, Emax ~ 1, logEC50 ~ 1), 
  data = emax_df
)
simulate(mod)
#>     dat_id sim_id        mu       val E0_Intercept  E0_cnt_a Emax_Intercept
#> 1        1      1  6.516390  6.551447     4.870387 0.5160866       10.01977
#> 2        2      1  7.843706  7.523790     4.870387 0.5160866       10.01977
#> 3        3      1  7.138687  7.113677     4.870387 0.5160866       10.01977
#> 4        4      1  6.999249  6.873368     4.870387 0.5160866       10.01977
